title: Migrate from stores/$: to runes
description: Move component state from legacy stores and $: labels to $state/$derived/$effect incrementally and verifiably.
body: Steps: 1. Inventory the component's reactive surface: $: labels, writable/derived stores, and auto-subscriptions. 2. Replace local component state with $state and computed $: with $derived. 3. Convert reactive side effects ($: that perform actions) into $effect with explicit cleanup. 4. Keep cross-component shared state as stores or a $state-in-module until the whole graph is migrated. 5. Run the component tests after each conversion. Rollback point: per component, before deleting the legacy declarations. Validation: tests pass and no mixed-mode reactivity warning appears for the migrated component.
